overview: Monstera is a tropical climbing houseplant known for its split leaves. It grows best with steady warmth, bright filtered light, and a chunky, well-draining potting mix.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Monstera","overview":"Monstera is a tropical climbing houseplant known for its split leaves. It grows best with steady warmth, bright filtered light, and a chunky, well-draining potting mix.","tips":"Give it a moss pole or support if you want larger, more mature leaves."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"龟背竹","overview":"龟背竹是一种热带攀援型室内观叶植物，以带有裂口和孔洞的大叶片闻名。它喜欢稳定温暖的环境、明亮散射光和疏松排水好的介质。","tips":"如果想让叶片更大更成熟，可以给它加苔藓杆或支撑架。"}}

overview: Pothos is a fast-growing trailing plant with heart-shaped leaves. It is one of the easiest indoor plants for beginners and tolerates a wide range of rooms.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Pothos","overview":"Pothos is a fast-growing trailing plant with heart-shaped leaves. It is one of the easiest indoor plants for beginners and tolerates a wide range of rooms.","tips":"Trim long vines to encourage fuller growth and root cuttings in water."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"绿萝","overview":"绿萝是一种生长很快的垂吊植物，叶片呈心形。它非常适合新手，能适应多种室内光照和养护条件。","tips":"定期修剪过长藤蔓可以让株型更丰满，剪下的枝条也能水培生根。"}}

overview: Snake Plant has upright sword-like leaves and stores water in thick foliage. It is highly drought tolerant and works well in bedrooms, offices, and low-maintenance spaces.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Snake Plant","overview":"Snake Plant has upright sword-like leaves and stores water in thick foliage. It is highly drought tolerant and works well in bedrooms, offices, and low-maintenance spaces.","tips":"Use a pot with drainage and avoid watering into the center of the rosette."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"虎尾兰","overview":"虎尾兰有直立剑形叶片，厚实叶片能储水。它非常耐旱，适合卧室、办公室和低维护空间。","tips":"使用带排水孔的花盆，浇水时尽量避免让水积在叶心。"}}

overview: ZZ Plant has glossy upright leaves and thick rhizomes that store water. It is a reliable choice for lower-light spaces and irregular watering routines.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"ZZ Plant","overview":"ZZ Plant has glossy upright leaves and thick rhizomes that store water. It is a reliable choice for lower-light spaces and irregular watering routines.","tips":"Rotate the pot occasionally so stems grow evenly toward the light."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"金钱树","overview":"金钱树有油亮直立的叶片和能储水的肥厚根茎。它适合光线偏弱的空间，也能容忍不规律浇水。","tips":"偶尔转动花盆，让枝叶均匀朝光生长。"}}

overview: Peace Lily is a leafy indoor plant with white spathes that appear above dark green foliage. It prefers evenly moist soil and stable indoor conditions.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Peace Lily","overview":"Peace Lily is a leafy indoor plant with white spathes that appear above dark green foliage. It prefers evenly moist soil and stable indoor conditions.","tips":"Wipe leaves regularly so the plant can photosynthesize efficiently."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"白掌","overview":"白掌有浓绿叶片和白色佛焰苞，花序高于叶丛。它喜欢土壤保持微湿和稳定的室内环境。","tips":"定期擦拭叶片能提高光合作用效率，也能让叶片更有光泽。"}}

overview: Spider Plant forms arching striped leaves and baby plantlets on long stems. It is adaptable, fast-growing, and simple to propagate.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Spider Plant","overview":"Spider Plant forms arching striped leaves and baby plantlets on long stems. It is adaptable, fast-growing, and simple to propagate.","tips":"Plantlets can be rooted while still attached or clipped and rooted separately."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"吊兰","overview":"吊兰会长出拱形条纹叶片，并在长茎上形成小植株。它适应性强、生长快，也很容易繁殖。","tips":"小吊兰可以连在母株上生根，也可以剪下后单独扦插。"}}

overview: Rubber Plant has broad glossy leaves and a strong upright shape. It becomes a bold indoor tree when given bright filtered light and consistent watering.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Rubber Plant","overview":"Rubber Plant has broad glossy leaves and a strong upright shape. It becomes a bold indoor tree when given bright filtered light and consistent watering.","tips":"Dust the large leaves often and rotate the pot for even growth."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"橡皮树","overview":"橡皮树有宽大油亮的叶片和挺拔株型。在明亮散射光和稳定浇水下，它能长成很有存在感的室内小树。","tips":"经常清洁大叶片，并定期转盆，让植株受光更均匀。"}}

overview: Fiddle Leaf Fig is an indoor tree with large violin-shaped leaves. It rewards stable bright light and steady watering but dislikes frequent movement.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Fiddle Leaf Fig","overview":"Fiddle Leaf Fig is an indoor tree with large violin-shaped leaves. It rewards stable bright light and steady watering but dislikes frequent movement.","tips":"Avoid moving it often; choose a bright spot and let it settle."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"琴叶榕","overview":"琴叶榕是一种室内树形植物，拥有大而像小提琴的叶片。它需要稳定的强散射光和规律浇水，不喜欢频繁移动。","tips":"选好明亮位置后尽量少移动，让它有时间适应环境。"}}

overview: Chinese Money Plant has round coin-shaped leaves on slender stems. It stays compact, grows quickly in bright light, and often produces small offsets.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Chinese Money Plant","overview":"Chinese Money Plant has round coin-shaped leaves on slender stems. It stays compact, grows quickly in bright light, and often produces small offsets.","tips":"Separate offsets once they have their own small roots."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"镜面草","overview":"镜面草有圆圆的硬币状叶片和细长叶柄。它株型紧凑，在明亮光线下生长较快，也常长出小侧芽。","tips":"等侧芽长出自己的小根后，再把它们分株栽种。"}}

overview: Boston Fern has soft arching fronds and a lush texture. It prefers evenly moist soil, filtered light, and higher humidity than most common houseplants.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Boston Fern","overview":"Boston Fern has soft arching fronds and a lush texture. It prefers evenly moist soil, filtered light, and higher humidity than most common houseplants.","tips":"A bright bathroom or humid corner is often better than a dry sunny shelf."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"波士顿蕨","overview":"波士顿蕨有柔软下垂的羽状叶，整体质感蓬松。相比多数常见室内植物，它更喜欢湿润土壤、过滤光和较高空气湿度。","tips":"明亮的浴室或湿度较高的角落，通常比干燥晒台更适合它。"}}

overview: Calathea is grown for broad patterned leaves with pale striping. It prefers soft filtered light, stable warmth, and consistently moist soil.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Calathea","overview":"Calathea is grown for broad patterned leaves with pale striping. It prefers soft filtered light, stable warmth, and consistently moist soil.","tips":"Use filtered or rested water if leaf edges brown despite good humidity."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"圆叶竹芋","overview":"圆叶竹芋以宽大带浅色条纹的叶片为观赏重点。它喜欢柔和散射光、稳定温暖环境和持续微湿的土壤。","tips":"如果湿度合适但叶缘仍发黄发焦，可以改用过滤水或静置后的水。"}}

overview: Heartleaf Philodendron is a trailing plant with soft heart-shaped leaves. It is adaptable, fast-growing, and works well in hanging pots or on shelves.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Heartleaf Philodendron","overview":"Heartleaf Philodendron is a trailing plant with soft heart-shaped leaves. It is adaptable, fast-growing, and works well in hanging pots or on shelves.","tips":"Pinch back long vines to keep the plant full."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"心叶蔓绿绒","overview":"心叶蔓绿绒是一种垂吊植物，叶片柔软呈心形。它适应性强、生长快，适合吊盆或摆在架子上自然垂落。","tips":"适当摘心或修剪长藤，可以让植株保持丰满。"}}

overview: Aloe Vera is a succulent with thick water-storing leaves. It needs strong light, fast-draining soil, and long dry periods between watering.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Aloe Vera","overview":"Aloe Vera is a succulent with thick water-storing leaves. It needs strong light, fast-draining soil, and long dry periods between watering.","tips":"A gritty cactus mix and drainage hole are more important than frequent watering."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"芦荟","overview":"芦荟是叶片肥厚、能储水的多肉植物。它需要充足光照、快速排水的土壤，以及两次浇水之间较长的干燥期。","tips":"颗粒感强的仙人掌介质和排水孔，比频繁浇水更重要。"}}

overview: Echeveria is a compact rosette succulent with powdery leaves. It needs strong light and dry soil to stay colorful and symmetrical.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Echeveria","overview":"Echeveria is a compact rosette succulent with powdery leaves. It needs strong light and dry soil to stay colorful and symmetrical.","tips":"If the rosette stretches upward, it needs more light."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"拟石莲花","overview":"拟石莲花是紧凑莲座状多肉，叶片带粉感。它需要强光和偏干土壤，才能保持颜色和对称株型。","tips":"如果莲座开始向上拉长，通常说明光照不足。"}}

overview: Jade Plant is a woody succulent with thick oval leaves. It grows slowly, lives for many years, and prefers bright light with dry soil cycles.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Jade Plant","overview":"Jade Plant is a woody succulent with thick oval leaves. It grows slowly, lives for many years, and prefers bright light with dry soil cycles.","tips":"Prune lightly to keep a compact tree-like shape."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"玉树","overview":"玉树是木质化多肉植物，叶片厚实椭圆。它生长较慢、寿命很长，喜欢明亮光线和干湿分明的浇水节奏。","tips":"轻度修剪能帮助它维持紧凑的小树形态。"}}

overview: Ladyfinger Cactus forms clusters of narrow cylindrical stems covered in small spines. It is compact, drought tolerant, and ideal for bright windowsills.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Ladyfinger Cactus","overview":"Ladyfinger Cactus forms clusters of narrow cylindrical stems covered in small spines. It is compact, drought tolerant, and ideal for bright windowsills.","tips":"Use a gritty mineral-heavy mix and never let the pot sit in water."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"金手指仙人掌","overview":"金手指仙人掌会形成一簇簇细长圆柱茎，表面布满小刺。它株型小巧、耐旱，适合明亮窗台。","tips":"使用颗粒和矿物质比例高的介质，避免花盆长期积水。"}}

overview: Moth Orchid is a common indoor orchid with long-lasting blooms. It grows in bark mix, prefers filtered light, and needs roots that can breathe.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Moth Orchid","overview":"Moth Orchid is a common indoor orchid with long-lasting blooms. It grows in bark mix, prefers filtered light, and needs roots that can breathe.","tips":"Keep the crown dry and let excess water drain fully after watering."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"蝴蝶兰","overview":"蝴蝶兰是常见室内兰花，花期较长。它通常种在树皮介质中，喜欢过滤光和透气的根系环境。","tips":"浇水后让多余水分充分流走，并保持叶心干燥。"}}

overview: Anthurium has glossy heart-shaped leaves and colorful waxy spathes. It prefers bright filtered light, airy soil, and warm humid conditions.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Anthurium","overview":"Anthurium has glossy heart-shaped leaves and colorful waxy spathes. It prefers bright filtered light, airy soil, and warm humid conditions.","tips":"Use an airy mix with bark or perlite instead of dense potting soil."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"红掌","overview":"红掌有油亮心形叶片和彩色蜡质佛焰苞。它喜欢明亮散射光、透气介质和温暖湿润环境。","tips":"使用含树皮或珍珠岩的透气介质，不要用过于板结的土。"}}

overview: Lucky Bamboo is a Dracaena often grown in water or a light potting mix. It is compact, decorative, and tolerant of indoor light.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"Lucky Bamboo","overview":"Lucky Bamboo is a Dracaena often grown in water or a light potting mix. It is compact, decorative, and tolerant of indoor light.","tips":"Use filtered water if leaf tips brown or stems yellow."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"富贵竹","overview":"富贵竹是常以水培或轻质介质栽培的龙血树属植物。它株型小巧、有装饰性，也能适应室内光线。","tips":"如果叶尖发黄或茎秆变黄，可以尝试使用过滤水。"}}

overview: English Ivy is a trailing vine with lobed leaves. Indoors it prefers cool rooms, bright filtered light, and evenly moist soil.
localizedContentsJSON: {"en":{"commonName":"English Ivy","overview":"English Ivy is a trailing vine with lobed leaves. Indoors it prefers cool rooms, bright filtered light, and evenly moist soil.","tips":"Trim vines regularly for a denser, less tangled plant."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"常春藤","overview":"常春藤是一种带裂叶的垂蔓植物。室内养护时，它更喜欢凉爽房间、明亮散射光和均匀微湿的土壤。","tips":"定期修剪藤蔓，可以让株型更浓密，也不容易打结。"}}
